spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_ID_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI ID WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of ID for for write address, write data, read address and read data

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI DATA WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI ADDR WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_AWUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI AWUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of optional user defined signal in write address channel

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_ARUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI ARUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of optional user defined signal in read address channel

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_WUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI WUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of optional user defined signal in write data channel

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_RUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI RUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of optional user defined signal in read data channel

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_C2C_AXI_BUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S C2C AXI BUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of optional user defined signal in write response channel

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_CFG_AXI_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S CFG AXI DATA WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_S_CFG_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C S CFG AXI ADDR WIDTH
